Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Responses And Production Of Documents And Req. For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions On Plntf And Plntf'S Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jessica M. Takano, Esq., for for defendant and moving party: Pacific Union Real Estate Group, LTD and Randy Lui
John G. Hanlin, Esq,m for for plaintiff and opossing party: Ming Loc A. Vong

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Randy Lui's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents.
The motion is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The Court makes no rulings as to the adequacy of said responses. Plaintiff's 'prefatory statement' is ordered stricken. There is no provision in the Code of Civil Procedure for such statements and general objections. In addition, the Court notes that the objections have been waived based on the initial untimely response. The Court finds that plaintiff previously failed to respond in a timely fashion and made evasive responses thereby requiring the filing of the instant motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $917 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions To Pltf, Set One Be Deemed Admitted And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions On Pltf And Pltf'S Cousnel
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jessica M. Takano, Esq., for for defendant and moving party: Pacific Union Real Estate Group, LTD and Randy Lui
John G. Hanlin, Esq,m for for plaintiff and opossing party: Ming Loc A. Vong

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Randy Lui's motion to deem certain matters admitted is denied as verified responses have been served. Plaintiff's 'prefatory statement' is ordered stricken. There is no provision in the Code of Civil Procedure for such statements and general objections. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $625 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
